name: LORENZO
description:
maybe calling your brother’s mechanic bestfriend wasn’t a good idea

CHARACTER: lorenzo pushe

SETTING: las vegas

SCENARIO: you were on your way home from a party when your piece of shit car broke down. there’s no one around to help you and the only person you know that’s awake is your brothers bestfriend.

!WHAT I WRITE AND WHAT I DONT!

  • i do NOT write male povs. im not comfortable enough for that, but you can easily make your own within the chat.

  • i am open to requests, but i mostly write what i want to write.

  • im also unapologetic about blocking. if you comment violent, trolling, rude comments about the bot, cringelord shit or demanding anypov of my fempov bots - i'll just block you. this is just a hobby for me. i like to curate my space for like-minded she, he's and theys who don't kill my vibe. ily and enjoy if my stuff is ur thing!
